research_question: Does the act of writing a prompt for an AI code-review assistant — prior to seeing any AI output — shift a developer's confidence in their review verdict, independently of the AI output itself?

method_family:
### Participants

We will recruit 20 professional software engineers (not students), each with at least 3 years of experience and current active code-review practice. Recruitment through a participant pool at our institution and snowball sampling.

one_sentence_claim: Does the act of writing a prompt for an AI code-review assistant — prior to seeing any AI output — shift a developer's confidence in their review verdict, independently of the AI output itself?
